title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial on setting up and using Ollama and Claude Code to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, LLM selection like Qwen 3.5, and constructing a multi-agent travel app with Flask frontend.
